summary: Comprehensive testing of Phase 1 (Permission System) and Phase 2 (New Layout and Navigation) completed. All 16 backend API tests pass (100%). All frontend features working correctly including TopNavBar, ClubPage, ProfilePage with 5 tabs.

issues: Club logo shows 'TEST_Club' placeholder text when logo_url is invalid/broken image

seed_data_creation: Club created via tests (TEST_Club_*), Profile data updated for test@example.com user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 and Phase 2 features fully functional. TopNavBar shows 4 menus: Meu Clube, Minhas Equipas, Equipas dos Meus Filhos (only for users with associated accounts), Meu Perfil. ClubPage shows club info for all users, edit button only for admin. ProfilePage has 5 tabs: Identidade, Familiares, Biométricos, Desportivo, Equipamento. All profile fields working and persisting to database.

mocked_apis.email_notifications: MOCKED - Resend API not configured, emails logged but not sent

topnavbar_menus.description: TopNavBar shows Meu Clube, Minhas Equipas, Equipas dos Meus Filhos, Meu Perfil menus with correct data-testid attributes

club_page_admin.description: Admin can view club info and see Edit button

club_page_user.description: Regular user can view club info but Edit button is hidden

club_create_admin_only.description: Only admin can create clubs (403 for non-admin)

permissions_defaults.description: Admin can view default permissions for all roles

permissions_user.description: User can view own permissions, admin can view any user's permissions

profile_identity_tab.description: Identity tab shows photo, nome, apelido, alcunha, email, data nascimento, licença FPP

profile_family_tab.description: Family tab allows adding/removing family members (pai, mãe, outro)

profile_biometric_tab.description: Biometric tab shows peso, altura, tamanho calçado

profile_sports_tab.description: Sports tab shows ano chegada, nº FPP, função, posição, nº camisola

profile_equipment_tab.description: Equipment tab shows tamanhos (kit treino, fato treino, polo, meias)

profile_update_api.description: Profile data persists correctly to database

permission_system.description: Admin has full access, jogador can only edit own profile, user cannot edit other's profile

equipas_dos_meus_filhos_menu.description: Menu only appears for users with associated accounts
